mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT `adminmenus`.* FROM `adminuser` INNER JOIN `admin_user_role` ON `adminuser`.`adminId` = `admin_user_role`.`adminId` INNER JOIN `adminrole` ON `admin_user_role`.`roleId` = `adminrole`.`id` INNER JOIN `admin_role_menus` ON `adminrole`.`id` = `admin_role_menus`.`roleId` INNER JOIN `adminmenus` ON `admin_role_menus`.`menuId` = `adminmenus`.`id` WHERE `adminuser`.`del` = 0 AND `adminrole`.`del` = 0 AND `adminmenus`.`del` = 0 AND `adminuser`.`adminId` = #{adminId} AND `adminmenus`.type = 0;
